messages.content:
Identify the three important areas that organizations can consider to successfully transform to a green software mindset.


Green software, green capabilities, and green governance

Green IT infrastructure, green operating models, and green technology and tools

Green processes, green cloud, and green operating models

Green IT infrastructure, green cloud, and green software
mindset

Which of the following are the seven prioritized areas of green software?


Green artificial intelligence (AI); green digital experience; green blockchain technology; green infrastructure; green software development life cycle; green human resources; green distributed ledger technology (DLT)

Green digital experience; green cloud, edge, and data centers; green human resources policies; green organizational processes; green data; green artificial intelligence (AI); green blockchain technology

Green cloud, edge, and data centers; green hardware and infrastructure; green artificial intelligence (AI); green data; green distributed ledger technology (DLT); green blockchain technology; green organizational processes

Green software development life cycle; green digital experience; green cloud, edge, and data centers; green data; green distributed ledger technology (DLT); green artificial intelligence (AI); green infrastructure

Green digital experience; green cloud, edge, and data centers; green human resources policies; green organizational processes; green data; green artificial intelligence (AI); green blockchain technology.

Which of the following is not a characteristic of companies that follow a single, combined path for transformation?


Focusing on business ideas that leverage technology to deliver sustainability impact

Taking action to minimize the negative environmental impact of technology

Directing R&D investment and initiatives toward sustainability and technology simultaneously

Upgrading technology for next-level digital transformation without prioritizing sustainability
Upgrading technology for next-level digital transformation without prioritizing sustainability.

A financial management firm uses distributed ledger technology (DLT) for recording their asset transactions. Which of the following steps can the firm take to reduce their carbon footprint from DLT?


They can eliminate storage data.

They can choose energy-efficient algorithms and ensure green blockchain design principles in the existing DLT.

They can choose other products and platforms.
They can choose energy-efficient algorithms and ensure green blockchain design principles in the existing DLT.

Which of the following actions is not a way in which every member of society can reduce technology’s impact on global carbon emissions?


Change electronic devices every year.

Switch from high-definition to standard quality when streaming video.

Write fewer emails.

Delete unwanted files from the cloud.
Change electronic devices every year.

Which of the following is a way to make software more green?


Adjusting the software development life cycle to be leaner and cleaner

Using software for greener use such as tracking deforestation

Making software more secure

Making efficient use of human resources
Adjusting the software development life cycle to be leaner and cleaner.

You are part of a team that’s researching the carbon intensity of Accenture’s supplier companies. The team is calculating the existing carbon emissions of these companies and finding ways to reduce the emissions. Which of Accenture’s sustainability growth priorities are you addressing through this project?


Responsible value chains

Sustainable technologies

Consumer brand, growth, and experience

Sustainability measurement
Responsible value chains.

Why must businesses embrace breakthrough technology, such as artificial intelligence (AI) and green cloud, to take action on climate change?


Technology can help businesses not only reduce their carbon emissions but also their cost of operations.

Technology can help businesses quickly transition to renewable sources of energy.

Technology can help businesses make their value chains agile in a volatile market.
Technology can help businesses not only reduce their carbon emissions but also their cost of operations.

The UN refers to 2020–2030 as the “decade of action” to tackle climate-related challenges. What is the primary factor behind the damage caused to the Earth’s natural warming systems?


Ecosystem extinction

Ocean acidification

Industrial Revolution

Global warming

Permafrost thawing
Global warming.

ABC Corporation Pvt. Ltd. has decided to embed climate action into their business strategy to reduce their carbon footprint. Apart from being environmentally conscious, which of the following financial benefits will the company enjoy by implementing sustainability throughout their value chain?


Revenue uplift, cost reduction, risk reduction, and brand recognition

High carbon credits and less carbon taxes

Higher profit margins and less tax payments

Reduction in annual taxes paid to the government
Revenue uplift, cost reduction, risk reduction, and brand recognition.
